notes: German national standards body. Primarily publishes DIN editions of ISO/IEC standards (technical content typically identical to the ISO original, language and front matter localised). Also publishes purely-national DIN standards on engineering, materials, processes. Paywalled at beuth.de (DIN's distribution arm).

match_nodes.description: DIN editions of ISO/IEC standards (content tracks ISO master)

data.notes: DIN editions of ISO/IEC standards. Technical content tracks the ISO master; refer to secid:control/iso.org/<n> for the canonical record. This match_node exists so DIN-prefixed citations resolve to a known namespace.

examples.note: Resolves the German DIN edition; cross-reference secid:control/iso.org/27001.
